pack.rate_is_window_local: complete_bpw here is this window's own rate, not the model's. The ladder's target is weighted by routed experts, which are 97.492 percent of the model and are the largest tensors, so a window of small dense organs bills higher and a window of experts bills lower. Only the whole-model roll-up is comparable to the 0.75 ceiling.
